ocr.text: The table presents various regions and their corresponding data on countries, centers, total cases, and odds ratios (OR) with
95% confidence intervals. In the Africa region, there is 1 country and 1 center reporting a total of 833 cases, with high vs. never
at 1.41 (0.24–8.43), medium vs. never at 0.32 (0.03–3.32), and low vs. never at 0.32 (0.04–2.71). The Asia-Pacific region
comprises 3 countries and 5 centers, totaling 13,064 cases, showing high vs. never at 1.27 (0.95–1.69), medium vs. never at
1.25 (0.98–1.61), and low vs. never at 0.93 (0.75–1.15). In the Eastern Mediterranean, 2 countries and 4 centers report 7,882
cases with high vs. never at 1.20 (0.83–1.73), medium vs. never at 1.12 (0.79–1.59), and low vs. never at 0.93 (0.67–1.28). The
Indian subcontinent has 1 country and 7 centers, totaling 16,972 cases, with high vs. never at 2.43 (1.66–3.56), medium vs.
never at 1.41 (0.97–2.04), and low vs. never at 1.48 (1.06–2.07). Latin America shows 5 countries and 7 centers with 15,641
cases, high vs. never at 1.51 (1.22–1.88), medium vs.

never at 1.33 (1.09–1.61), and low vs. never at 1.08 (0.91–1.30). North America has 2 countries and 2 centers reporting 3,076
cases, with high vs. never at 1.60 (1.12–2.29), medium vs. never at 1.88 (1.37–2.59), and low vs. never at 1.13 (0.87–1.48).
Northern and Eastern Europe has 3 countries and 3 centers totaling 6,592 cases, with high vs. never at 1.12 (0.76–1.66),
medium vs. never at 1.23 (0.87–1.74), and low vs. never at 0.98 (0.71–1.36). Oceania consists of 1 country and 4 centers with
9,541 cases, high vs. never at 1.08 (0.83–1.41), medium vs. never at 1.16 (0.96–1.39), and low vs. never at 1.02 (0.87–1.21).
Finally, Western Europe shows 3 countries and 12 centers with 26,953 cases, high vs. never at 1.23 (1.00–1.52), medium vs.
never at 1.22 (1.06–1.41), and low vs. never at 1.07 (0.93–1.22).
